name.description: The name or variety of the tulip flower

color.description: Primary color of the tulip flower

description.description: Detailed description of the tulip flower

height.description: Height of the tulip in centimeters

image_url.description: URL or path to the tulip flower image

planting_date.description: Date when the tulip was planted

is_favorite.description: Whether this tulip is marked as a favorite
